"cvss_severities": {"cvss_v3": {"score": 6.5, "vector_string": "CVSS:3.1/AV:N/AC:L/PR:L/UI:N/S:U/C:N/I:H/A:N"}, "cvss_v4": {"score": 0.0, "vector_string": null}}, "cwes": [{"cwe_id": "CWE-280", "name": "Improper Handling of Insufficient Permissions or Privileges "}], "description": "### Impact

A CMS user with limited access to form pages could delete submissions to form pages they don't have access to by crafting a form submission to delete submissions on a page they do have access to for submissions they don't. 

The vulnerability is not exploitable by an ordinary site visitor without access to the Wagtail admin.

### Patches

Patched versions have been released as Wagtail 7.0.7 and 7.3.2. The new 7.4 LTS feature release also incorporates this fix.

### Workarounds

No workaround is available.


### Acknowledgements

Wagtail thanks Vishal Shukla @shukla304 for reporting this issue.

### For more information
If there are any questions or comments about this advisory:

* Visit Wagtail's [support channels](https://docs.wagtail.org/en/stable/support.html)
* Send an email to [security@wagtail.org](mailto:security@wagtail.org) (view the [security policy](https://github.com/wagtail/wagtail/security/policy) for more information).", "epss": {"percentage": 0.00174, "percentile": 0.07075}, "ghsa_id": "GHSA-pwm3-7fv4-g6xx", "github_reviewed_at": "2026-05-08T20:20:12Z", "html_url": "https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-pwm3-7fv4-g6xx", "identifiers": [{"type": "GHSA", "value": "GHSA-pwm3-7fv4-g6xx"}, {"type": "CVE", "value": "CVE-2026-44199"}], "nvd_published_at": "2026-05-11T16:17:35Z", "published_at": "2026-05-08T20:20:12Z", "references": ["https://github.com/wagtail/wagtail/security/advisories/GHSA-pwm3-7fv4-g6xx", "https://nvd.nist.gov/vuln/detail/CVE-2026-44199", "https://github.com/pypa/advisory-database/tree/main/vulns/wagtail/PYSEC-2026-148.yaml", "https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-pwm3-7fv4-g6xx"], "repository_advisory_url": "https://api.github.com/repos/wagtail/wagtail/security-advisories/GHSA-pwm3-7fv4-g6xx", "severity": "medium", "source_code_location": "https://github.com/wagtail/wagtail", "summary": "Wagtail has improper permission handling when deleting form submissions", "type": "reviewed", "updated_at": "2026-06-08T19:55:42Z", "url": "https://api.github.com/advisories/GHSA-pwm3-7fv4-g6xx", "vulnerabilities": [{"first_patched_version": "7.0.7", "package": {"ecosystem": "pip", "name": "wagtail"}, "vulnerable_functions": [], "vulnerable_version_range": "< 7.0.7"}, {"first_patched_version": "7.3.2", "package": {"ecosystem": "pip", "name": "wagtail"}, "vulnerable_functions": [], "vulnerable_version_range": ">= 7.1, < 7.3.2"}], "withdrawn_at": null}

title: Wagtail has improper permission handling when deleting form submissions
